title: P0.1: Template List Renders with Tabs and Action Buttons
verifies: template list core UI renders with tab toggle group, add/import buttons, and data table

title: P0.2: Prebuilt Template Guard — Delete Button Disabled & Badge Visible
verifies: prebuilt templates show a distinguishing badge and have disabled delete buttons

title: P1.1: Template Tab Filtering — All / Prebuilt / Custom
verifies: clicking tab toggles correctly filters visible rows to match the selected filter

title: P1.2: Edit (Update) a Custom Template
verifies: opening a custom template in edit mode allows updating the body and persisting the change

title: P1.3: Clone a Custom Template
verifies: cloning a template creates a Copy_of_ copy without overwriting the original

title: P1.4: Prebuilt Templates Excluded from Bulk Selection
verifies: select-all checkbox excludes prebuilt rows so only custom rows get selected for bulk delete

title: P2.1: Empty Template Name Validation
verifies: saving with an empty name triggers inline validation error

title: P2.2: Invalid Resource Name Validation
verifies: names with spaces or disallowed characters are rejected with a descriptive error
